response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for '愛♡スクリーム!'. Since the reference is partial, I am manually transcribing and translating the full performance. 'RELAY' begins at the end of the clip; transcribing the opening shout. Pacing is upbeat and rhythmic, so I am using precise start times and instantaneous transitions to maintain synchronization with the musical phrasing.
